name: @agentstate-lite/ui
description: React SPA for `agentstate-lite ui` (plans/ui-v1.md rev 3.2): board/detail/admin/graph views over the wire-protocol v0 surface, served same-origin by the CLI's local ui server. PRIVATE — never enters the CLI's npm dependency graph; only this package's BUILT dist/ assets are gzip-embedded into the CLI's esbuild bundle (packages/cli/scripts/embed-ui-assets.mjs).
